   通过基本图片制作新的动态壁纸动画，或为壁纸导入 HTML 或视频文件。
   使用 Steam 创意工坊免费分享和下载壁纸。
   Wallpaper Engine 可与任何其他 Steam 游戏或应用程序同时使用。
   支持的视频格式：mp4、WebM、avi、m4v、mov、wmv（对于本地文件，创意工坊仅支持 mp4）。
   使用免费的 Android 伴侣应用程序，随身携带您最喜爱的场景和视频壁纸。
   支持 Razer Chroma 和 Corsair iCUE。  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine 旨在提供有趣的体验，同时尽可能少占用系统资源。您可以选择在使用其他应用程序或全屏播放（包括无边框窗口模式）时自动暂停或完全停止壁纸，以免在玩游戏或工作时分散注意力或受到妨碍。许多微调质量和性能的选项可使 Wallpaper Engine 完美地适合您的计算机。根据一般经验，3D、2D 和基于视频的壁纸表现最佳，而网站和应用程序需要占用您系统中更多的资源。强烈建议您使用专用 GPU，但这不是必要要求。     Steam 创意工坊中提供超过一百万张免费壁纸，而且每天都会上传新壁纸！找不到适合您心情的壁纸？通过使用 Wallpaper Engine 编辑器从图片、视频、网站或应用程序创建自己的动画壁纸，尽情发挥您的想象力。大量的预设和效果可让您为自己的图片制作动画，并在 Steam 创意工坊上分享或仅为己用。

有了 Wallpaper Engine，您可以在 Windows 桌面上使用動態桌布。支援各種類型的動態桌布，包括 3D 和 2D 動畫、網站、視訊，甚至是特定應用程式。選擇現有桌布或自己創造桌布，並且在 Steam Workshop 上與大家分享！除此之外，您可使用 Android 版 Wallpaper Engine 隨附應用程式，將您最愛的動態桌布傳輸至 Android 行動裝置，隨時隨地好好欣賞。
 
  新功能： 使用免費的Android 隨附應用程式，將您最愛的桌布傳輸至 Android 行動裝置。
 
  
 
   透過即時影像顯示、視訊、應用程式或網站，讓您的桌面活起來。
   離開電腦時開啟動態螢幕保護程式。
   用您最喜愛的顏色，個人化動態桌布。
   使用可用滑鼠控制的互動式桌布。
   支援多種外觀比例與原始解析度，包含 16:9、21:9、16:10、4:3。
   支援多顯示器環境。
   遊玩遊戲時，桌布將暫停運作，以節省效能。
   在 Wallpaper Engine 編輯器上創造您專屬的動畫桌布。
   透過基本圖像或者匯入 HTML 及視訊檔案，創造新的動態桌布。
   Steam 工作坊可分享與下載桌布。
   Wallpaper Engine 可以與任何其他 Steam 遊戲或應用程式同時使用。
   支援的視訊檔案格式：mp4、WebM、avi、m4v、mov、wmv (針對本機檔案，工作坊則僅支援 mp4 格式)。
   使用免費的 Android 隨附應用程式，將您最愛的場景和視訊桌布帶著走。
   支援 Razer Chroma 和 Corsair iCUE。  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine 旨在以最少的系統資源，帶給您最大的樂趣體驗。您使用其他應用程式或全螢幕播放 (包括無邊框視窗模式) 時，可選擇使桌布自動暫停或完全停止，避免玩遊戲或工作時分散注意力或造成干擾。多種調整品質和效能的選項，讓您的 Wallpaper Engine 完美適用於您的電腦。一般而言，以 3D、2D 和視訊為基礎的桌布表現最佳，而以網站和應用程式為基礎的桌布則需要較多的系統資源。強烈建議您使用專用 GPU，但並非必要。     每天都有新的桌布上傳，您可從 Steam 工作坊上百萬個免費桌布精挑細選！找不到符合心情的桌布？不妨使用 Wallpaper Engine 編輯器，用圖像、視訊、網站或應用程式創造自己的動畫桌布，無限釋放您的想像。大量的預設和效果可供您自行以影像製作動畫，並在 Steam 工作坊上與大家分享，自己私藏獨享也行。

Wallpaper Engine te permite utilizar fondos de pantalla animados en el escritorio de Windows. Es compatible con varios tipos de fondos, incluyendo animaciones 3D y 2D, páginas web, vídeos e incluso aplicaciones. Elige un fondo de pantalla ya preparado o crea el tuyo propio y compártelo en Steam Workshop. Además, puedes utilizar la aplicación gratuita de Wallpaper Engine para Android y así transferirte tus fondos de pantalla favoritos a tu dispositivo y llevártelos a todas partes.
 
  NOVEDAD:  Usa la aplicación de Android para transferirte tus fondos favoritos a un dispositivo Android.
 
  
 
   Da vida a tus fondos de escritorio con gráficos, vídeos, aplicaciones o páginas web en tiempo real.
   Usa salvapantallas animados mientras no estés en el ordenador.
   Personaliza los fondos de pantalla animados con tus colores favoritos.
   Usa fondos de pantalla interactivos que puedes controlar con el ratón.
   Es compatible con muchas relaciones de aspecto y resoluciones nativas como, por ejemplo, 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Es compatible con el uso de varios monitores.
   Los fondos de pantalla se pausarán cuando jueges para que no afecten al rendimiento.
   Crea tus propios fondos de pantalla animados con el editor de Wallpaper Engine.
   Anima fondos de pantalla a partir de imágenes básicas o importa archivos HTML o de vídeo para el fondo de pantalla.
   Usa Steam Workshop para compartir y descargar fondos de pantalla de forma gratuita.
   Puedes usar Wallpaper Engine al mismo tiempo que cualquier otro juego o aplicación de Steam.
   Formatos de vídeo compatibles: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (para archivos locales, Workshop solo admite mp4).
   Usa la aplicación gratis para Android y llévate tus fondos de pantalla de escena o de vídeo favoritos a cualquier parte.
   Compatible con Razer Chroma y Corsair iCUE.  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine tiene como objetivo ofrecer una experiencia de entretenimiento empleando la menor cantidad posible de recursos del sistema. Wallpaper Engine vous permet d'utiliser des fonds d'écran animés sur votre bureau Windows.    Android用無料コンパニオンアプリを使用して、お気に入りのシーンや動く壁紙を自由に持ち歩くことが可能。

    Wallpaper Engineは使用するシステムリソースを最小限に抑えつつ、エンターテイメント性の高い体験の提供を目指しています。Wallpaper Engineではゲームプレイや作業の妨げにならないよう、他アプリケーション使用時や全画面表示時または仮想フルスクリーン利用時においては、壁紙を自動的に一時停止または完全に停止させることが可能です。また、性能やパフォーマンスを調整できる機能が多く用意されており、Wallpaper Engineとお使いのPCとの互換性を高めやすい環境が整っています。基本的に3D、2Dならびに動画ベースの壁紙のパフォーマンスが最も高く、ウェブサイトやアプリケーションを利用する際には多くのシステムリソースが必要になります。必須ではありませんが、専用GPUを準備されることを推奨します。     Steamワークショップには日々新しい壁紙がアップロードされ、100万を超える中から好きな壁紙を無料で選ぶことができます。お気に入りの壁紙が見つからない場合でも心配無用。Wallpaper Engineエディタを使って想像力を大いに働かせてみてください。画像、動画、ウェブサイトまたはアプリケーションを利用し、動く要素が追加された壁紙を作成することが可能です。多種多様なプリセットやエフェクトを使って自分だけの動く壁紙を作ってみてください。作成した壁紙は自分で使用するのも結構ですが、Steamワークショップで共有することも可能です。

    Wallpaper Engine aims to deliver an entertaining experience while using as few system resources as possible. You can choose to automatically pause or completely stop the wallpaper while using another application or playing fullscreen (including borderless windowed mode) to not distract or hinder you while playing a game or working. Une large sélection de préréglages et d'effets vous permet d'animer vos propres images et de les partager sur Steam Workshop ou de les utiliser simplement pour vous-même.

Wallpaper Engine erlaubt es dir, animierte Hintergründe auf deinem Windows-Desktop zu verwenden. Es werden verschiedene Arten von animierten Hintergründen unterstützt, darunter 3D- und 2D-Animationen, Websiten, Videos und sogar eine Auswahl an Anwendungen. Wähle aus bereits existierenden Hintergründen oder erstelle deine eigenen und teile sie auf dem Steam Workshop! Außerdem kannst du die kostenlose Begleit-App von Wallpaper Engine für Android installieren und deine Lieblingshintergründe auf dein Mobilgerät übertragen und überall hin mitnehmen.
 
  NEU:  Nutze die kostenlose Begleit-App für Android und übertrage deine Lieblingshintergründe auf dein Android-Gerät.
 
    
 
   Erwecke deinen Desktop mit Hilfe von Echtzeit-Grafiken, Videos, Anwendungen oder Websiten zum Leben.
   Personalisiere animierte Hintergründe mit Farben deiner Wahl.
   Benutze interaktive Hintergründe, welche mit deiner Maus gesteuert werden können.
   Vollständige Unterstützung für alle Arten von Bildschirmverhältnissen und Auflösungen werden unterstützt, darunter 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Umgebungen mit mehreren Monitoren werden vollständig unterstützt.
   Hintergründe pausieren automatisch während des Spielens, damit die Leistung deines Computers nicht sinkt.
   Erstelle deine eigenen animierten Hintergründe im Wallpaper Engine-Editor.
   Animiere neue Live-Hintergründe durch das Importieren von einfachen Bildern, HTML- oder Video-Dateien für den Hintergrund.
   Nutze den Steam Workshop kostenlos um Hintergründe zu teilen und herunterzuladen.
   Wallpaper Engine kann gleichzeitig mit anderen Steam-Spielen oder Anwendungen genutzt werden.
   Unterstützte Video-Formate: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (für lokale Dateien, Workshop unterstützt nur mp4).
   Nutze die kostenlose Begleit-App für Android und nimm deine Lieblingshintergründe unterwegs mit.
   Unterstützung für Razer Chroma und Corsair iCUE.  
    
 
      Wallpaper Engine liefert einen unterhaltsamen Desktop und nutzt dabei so wenig System-Ressourcen wie möglich. Du kannst die Anwendung so einstellen, dass sie Hintergründe automatisch pausiert oder vollständig stoppt, während eine andere Anwendung im Vollbildmodus ausgeführt wird (inklusive randlosen Fenstermodus), damit du nicht während des Spielens oder Arbeitens abgelenkt oder behindert wirst. Eine große Anzahl an Optionen zur Anpassung der Qualität und Leistung erlauben es dir, Wallpaper Engine perfekt an deinen Computer anzupassen. Als Grundsatz gilt, dass 3D-, 2D- und Video-Hintergründe am besten ausgeführt werden, während Web- und Anwendungsbasierte Hintergründe mehr System-Ressourcen benötigen. Eine dedizierte GPU wird empfohlen, ist aber nicht erforderlich.       Wähle aus über einer Millionen kostenlosen Hintergründen aus dem Steam Workshop, darüber hinaus werden jeden Tag unzählige neue Hintergründe hochgeladen! Du kannst keinen Hintergrund finden, welcher deinem Geschmack entspricht? Entfalte deine Kreativität mit dem Wallpaper Engine-Editor um deine eigenen animierten Hintergründe aus Bildern, Videos, Websites oder Anwendungen zu erstellen. Eine große Auswahl an Vorkonfigurationen und Effekten erlauben es dir, Hintergründen aus eigenen Bildern zu erstellen und diese im Workshop zu teilen oder diese nur für dich selbst zu nutzen.

O Wallpaper Engine permite-lhe usar wallpapers animados no seu ambiente de trabalho do Windows. Vários tipos de wallpapers animados são suportados, incluindo animações em 3D e 2D, websites, vídeos e até mesmo certas aplicações. Escolha um wallpaper já existente ou crie o seu próprio e partilhe-o no Steam Workshop! Além disso, pode utilizar a aplicação complementar gratuita do Wallpaper Engine para Android para transferir os seus wallpapers favoritos para o seu dispositivo móvel Android e levar os seus wallpapers animados para toda a parte.
 
  NEW:  Utilize a aplicação complementar gratuita para Android para transferir os seus wallpapers favoritos para o seu dispositivo móvel Android.
 
    
 
   Dê vida ao seu ambiente de trabalho com gráficos, vídeos, aplicações ou websites em tempo real.
   Use wallpapers animados enquanto está afastado do seu computador.
   Personalize wallpapers animados com as suas cores favoritas.
   Use wallpapers interativos que podem ser controlados com o rato.
   Compatível com muitas proporções de ecrã e resoluções nativas, incluindo 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Pode ser usado em sistemas com vários monitores em simultâneo.
   Os wallpapers são pausados enquanto joga para melhorar o desempenho.
   Crie os seus próprios wallpapers animados no Wallpaper Engine Editor.
   Anime novos wallpapers a partir de imagens básicas, ou importe ficheiros HTML ou de vídeo para o wallpaper.
   Utilize o Steam Workshop para partilhar e transferir wallpapers gratuitamente.
   O Wallpaper Engine pode ser utilizado simultaneamente com qualquer outro jogo ou aplicação do Steam.
   Formatos de vídeo suportados: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (para ficheiros locais, Workshop só permite mp4).
   Utilize a aplicação complementar gratuita para Android para levar os seus wallpapers de cena e vídeo favoritos para qualquer lugar.
   Suporte para Razer Chroma e Corsair iCUE.  
    
 
      O Wallpaper Engine tem como objetivo oferecer uma experiência divertida usando o mínimo possível de recursos do sistema. Pode optar por pausar ou parar por completo o wallpaper automaticamente enquanto usa outra aplicação ou joga em ecrã completo (incluindo o modo de janela sem margens) para que o wallpaper não seja uma distração ou inconveniência enquanto estiver a jogar ou a trabalhar. Muitas opções de ajuste da qualidade e do desempenho permitem que o Wallpaper Engine se adapte perfeitamente ao seu computador. Como regra geral, os wallpapers em 3D, 2D e baseados em vídeo terão um melhor desempenho, ao passo que websites e aplicações necessitarão de mais recursos do seu sistema. Ter uma GPU dedicada é altamente recomendado, mas não obrigatório.       Escolha entre mais de um milhão de wallpapers gratuitos do Steam Workshop, com novos wallpapers adicionados todos os dias! Não encontra nenhum wallpaper adequado ao seu humor? Dê asas à sua imaginação utilizando o Wallpaper Engine Editor para criar os seus próprios wallpapers animados a partir de imagens, vídeos, websites ou aplicações. Uma grande variedade de predefinições e efeitos permitem que anime as suas próprias imagens e as partilhe no Steam Workshop ou as use apenas para si próprio.

Wallpaper Engine enables you to use live wallpapers on your Windows desktop. Various types of animated wallpapers are supported, including 3D and 2D animations, websites, videos and even certain applications. Choose an existing wallpaper or create your own and share it on the Steam Workshop! In addition to that, you can use the free Wallpaper Engine companion app for Android to transfer your favorite wallpapers to your Android mobile device and take your live wallpapers on the go.
 
  NEW:  Use the free Android companion app to transfer your favorite wallpapers to your Android mobile device.
 
    
 
   Bring your desktop wallpapers alive with realtime graphics, videos, applications or websites.
   Use animated screensavers while you are away from your computer.
   Personalize animated wallpapers with your favorite colors.
   Use interactive wallpapers that can be controlled with your mouse.
   Many aspect ratios and native resolutions supported including 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Multi monitor environments are supported.
   Wallpapers will pause while playing games to save performance.
   Create your own animated wallpapers in the Wallpaper Engine Editor.
   Animate new live wallpapers from basic images or import HTML or video files for the wallpaper.
   Use the Steam Workshop to share and download wallpapers for free.
   Wallpaper Engine can be used at the same time as any other Steam game or application.
   Supported video formats: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (for local files, Workshop only allows mp4).
   Use the free Android companion app to take your favorite scene and video wallpapers on the go.
   Support for Razer Chroma and Corsair iCUE.  
    
 
      Wallpaper Engine aims to deliver an entertaining experience while using as few system resources as possible. You can choose to automatically pause or completely stop the wallpaper while using another application or playing fullscreen (including borderless windowed mode) to not distract or hinder you while playing a game or working. Many options to tweak quality and performance allow you to make Wallpaper Engine fit your computer perfectly. As a general rule of thumb, 3D, 2D and video based wallpapers will perform best, while websites and applications will require more resources from your system. Having a dedicated GPU is highly recommended, but not required.       Choose from over a million free wallpapers from the Steam Workshop with new wallpapers being uploaded every day! Can't find a wallpaper that fits your mood? Let your imagination go wild by using the Wallpaper Engine Editor to create your own animated wallpapers from images, videos, websites or applications. A large selection of presets and effects allow you to animate your own images and share them on the Steam Workshop or to just use them for yourself.

Wallpaper Engine ti consente di usare sfondi dinamici sul tuo desktop di Windows. Supporta vari tipi di sfondi animati, tra cui animazioni 3D e 2D, siti web, video e alcune applicazioni. Seleziona uno sfondo esistente o creane uno nuovo e condividilo sul Workshop di Steam! Puoi anche usare l'app gratuita complementare di Wallpaper Engine per Android per trasferire i tuoi sfondi preferiti sul tuo dispositivo mobile Android quando e dove vuoi.
 
  NEW:  Trasferisci i tuoi sfondi preferiti sul tuo dispositivo mobile Android con l'app gratuita complementare per Android!
 
    
 
   Dai vita agli sfondi sul tuo desktop con grafica, video, applicazioni e siti web in tempo reale.
   Usa salvaschermi animati quando sei AFK.
   Personalizza gli sfondi animati con i tuoi colori preferiti.
   Usa sfondi interattivi che puoi controllare tramite mouse.
   Supporta molte proporzioni e risoluzioni native, tra cui 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Supporta ambienti con più monitor.
   Gli sfondi si metteranno in pausa durante il gioco per proteggere le prestazioni.
   Crea sfondi animati nell'editor di Wallpaper Engine.
   Anima nuovi sfondi dinamici a partire da immagini di base oppure importa file HTML o video per creare lo sfondo.
   Usa il Workshop di Steam per condividere e scaricare sfondi.
   Usa Wallpaper Engine contemporaneamente con un gioco o un'applicazione di Steam.
   Formati video supportati: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (per file locali, Workshop consente solo il formato mp4).
   Usa l'app gratuita complementare per Android per portare i tuoi sfondi video preferiti sempre con te.
   Supporta Razer Chroma e Corsair iCUE.  
    
 
      Wallpaper Engine ti offre un'esperienza divertente utilizzando la minore quantità di risorse possibile. Per evitare distrazioni o problemi mentre giochi o lavorio, potrai mettere in pausa o interrompere completamente lo sfondo in automatico quando usi un'altra applicazione o durante la riproduzione a schermo intero (compresa la modalità a finestre senza bordi). Le tante opzioni per perfezionare la qualità e le prestazioni ti consentiranno di adattare perfettamente Wallpaper Engine al tuo computer. In generale, gli sfondi basati su video 3D e 2D offriranno le prestazioni migliori, mentre i siti web e le applicazioni richiederanno risorse aggiuntive di sistema. Ti consigliamo di utilizzare una GPU dedicata, anche se non necessario.       Scegli tra oltre un milione di sfondi gratuiti dal Workshop di Steam, su cui vengono caricati nuovi sfondi ogni giorno! Non riesci a trovare uno sfondo adatto al tuo umore? Lascia viaggiare la tua immaginazione con l'editor di Wallpaper Engine per creare sfondi animati personalizzati a partire da immagini, video, siti web o applicazioni. Grazie all'ampia selezione di impostazioni ed effetti predefiniti, potrai dare vita alle tue immagini, condividerle sul Workshop di Steam o farne l'uso che preferisci.

title: Yakuza 5 Remastered
description:
Experience the fifth chapter of the Kazuma Kiryu saga in 1080p and 60fps.
 

 
In December 2012, Kazuma Kiryu left his past as a ""legendary yakuza"" and his place of peace in Okinawa.
 

 
He now spends his days as a cab driver in a corner of Fukuoka's red-light district, hiding his true identity. All for the sake of fulfilling the ""dream"" of an important person.
 

 
However, a disturbing atmosphere begins to drift through the supposedly well-balanced society of the Kanto and Kansai yakuza, emerging as a plot to drag all of the yakuza organizations in Japan to war.
 

 
In order to protect the ""dreams"" of his loved one, Kiryu is drawn into the vortex of battle once again.
 

 
This is the story of four men and a girl chasing their ""dreams"" in five major cities in Japan, presented on the largest scale of the series yet.
 

 
Complete The Dragon of Dojima’s journey.

localized_title.text: 人中之龙５　实现梦想者
人中之龍５　實現夢想者
龍が如く５　夢、叶えし者

localized_description.text:
以60帧1080p画质体验桐生一马传奇故事的第五章。
 

 
2012年12月，桐生一马抛下了作为“传说中的黑道”的过去，也离开了他在冲绳的安身之地。
 

 
现在，他隐藏起了自己的真实身份，在福冈红灯区的角落里当起了一名出租车司机。这一切都是为了实现一位重要之人的“梦想”。
 

 
然而，本应处于平衡的东西黑道之间，却弥漫起了令人不安的气氛，一场将日本所有黑道组织卷入战争的阴谋也逐渐浮出水面。
 

 
为了保护他所爱之人的“梦想”，桐生又被卷入了战斗的漩涡之中。
 

 
这是一个以日本五大城市为舞台，四个男人和一个女孩追逐“梦想”的故事，以系列迄今为止最大规模呈现。
 

 
完成“堂岛之龙”的不凡之旅。

以1080p 60 FPS的遊戲畫面，體驗桐生一馬冒險故事的第五章。
 

 
2012年12月，桐生一馬拋下自己身為「傳說中的黑道」的過去，離開了他在沖繩的安身之地。
 

 
現在的他隱姓埋名，在福岡紅燈區的一角擔任計程車司機。一切都是為了實現重要之人的「夢想」。
 

 
然而，原本維持著良好平衡的東西黑道，關係逐漸緊繃，全日本的黑道組織大戰一觸即發。
 

 
為了保護他所愛之人的「夢想」，桐生再次被捲入戰鬥漩渦之中。
 

 
這是一段關於四名男子和一名少女在日本五大都市追夢的故事，以系列開創以來最大規模的舞台為背景呈現。
 

 
完成「堂島之龍」的旅程。

Experience the fifth chapter of the Kazuma Kiryu saga in 1080p and 60fps.
 

 
In December 2012, Kazuma Kiryu left his past as a ""legendary yakuza"" and his place of peace in Okinawa.
 

 
He now spends his days as a cab driver in a corner of Fukuoka's red-light district, hiding his true identity. All for the sake of fulfilling the ""dream"" of an important person.
 

 
However, a disturbing atmosphere begins to drift through the supposedly well-balanced society of the Kanto and Kansai yakuza, emerging as a plot to drag all of the yakuza organizations in Japan to war.
 

 
In order to protect the ""dreams"" of his loved one, Kiryu is drawn into the vortex of battle once again.
 

 
This is the story of four men and a girl chasing their ""dreams"" in five major cities in Japan, presented on the largest scale of the series yet.
 

 
Complete The Dragon of Dojima’s journey.

Disfruta del quinto capítulo de la saga de Kazuma Kiryu en 1080p y 60fps.
 

 
En diciembre de 2012, Kazuma Kiryu dejó atrás su pasado como yakuza legendario y una pacífica vida en Okinawa.
 

 
Ahora vive clandestinamente en un rincón del barrio rojo de Fukuoka, donde trabaja como taxista. Y todo para cumplir el ""sueño"" de alguien importante.
 

 
Sin embargo, la inquietud empieza a resquebrajar el supuesto equilibrio entre la yakuza de Kanto y Kansai, revelando un ardid para arrastrar a todas las organizaciones yakuza de Japón a la guerra.
 

 
Para proteger los ""sueños"" de su amada, Kiryu se ve forzado a luchar una vez más.
 

 
Esta es la historia de cuatro hombres y una chica que persiguen sus ""sueños"" en cinco grandes ciudades de Japón a una escala nunca antes vista en la historia de la saga.
 

 
Completa el viaje del Dragón de Dojima.

Découvrez le cinquième opus de la saga de Kazuma Kiryu en 1080p et 60 ips.
 

 
En décembre 2012, Kazuma Kiryu a tiré un trait sur son passé de ""yakuza légendaire"" et sur son havre à Okinawa.
 

 
Dissimulant sa vraie identité, il travaille désormais comme chauffeur de taxi dans le quartier rouge de Fukuoka. Son but est d'accomplir le ""rêve"" de quelqu'un qui lui est cher.
 

 
Mais il règne un climat étrange qui semble dérégler l'équilibre entre les yakuzas du Kanto et ceux du Kansai, et qui pourrait bien aboutir sur une guerre dans laquelle toutes les organisations de yakuza du Japon finiraient.
 

 
Pour protéger les ""rêves"" de cette personne à qui il tient tant, Kiryu doit à nouveau plonger au cœur du combat.
 

 
Cette histoire est celle de quatre hommes et d'une fille à la poursuite de leur ""rêve"" dans cinq grandes villes du Japon, dans l'épisode le plus ambitieux de la série.
 

 
Complétez le périple du Dragon de Dojima.

Erleben Sie das fünfte Kapitel der Saga von Kazuma Kiryu in 1080p und 60 FPS.
 

 
Im Dezember 2012 ließ Kazuma Kiryu seine Vergangenheit als ""legendärer Yakuza"" hinter sich und verließ seinen Rückzugsort in Okinawa.
 

 
Nun verbringt er seine Tage als Taxifahrer im Rotlichtviertel von Fukuoka und verbirgt seine wahre Identität. Und das alles nur, um den ""Traum"" einer wichtigen Person zu verwirklichen.
 

 
Doch das scheinbare Gleichgewicht zwischen den Yakuza von Kanto und Kansai wird ins Wanken gebracht und entpuppt sich als Intrige, die alle Yakuza-Clans in ganz Japan in einen Krieg verstricken soll.
 

 
Um die ""Träume"" eines geliebten Menschen zu beschützen, muss Kiryu sich erneut dem Kampf stellen.
 

 
Dies ist die Geschichte von vier Männern und einem Mädchen, die in fünf großen Städten in Japan ihren ""Träumen"" nachjagen – erzählt auf eine in dieser Reihe noch nie dagewesene Weise.
 

 
Vollenden Sie die Reise des Drachen von Dojima.

Desfruta do quinto capítulo da saga de Kazuma Kiryu em 1080p e 60 fps.
 

 
Em dezembro de 2012, Kazuma Kiryu deixou o seu passado de “lendário yakuza” e o seu lugar de repouso em Okinawa.
 

 
Agora, ele passa os dias como taxista numa esquina do bairro de má reputação de Fukuoka, ocultando a sua verdadeira identidade. Tudo para ajudar uma pessoa importante para si a cumprir o seu sonho.
 

 
Contudo, algo ameaça afetar o equilíbrio entre os Kanto e os Kansai, e que traz ao de cima um plano para iniciar uma guerra entre todas as organizações yakuza do Japão.
 

 
De modo a proteger os sonhos da pessoa que ama, Kiryu é atraído novamente para o centro do conflito.
 

 
Esta é a história de quatro homens e uma rapariga que perseguem os seus sonhos em cinco grandes cidades do Japão, resultando no episódio com a maior escala de sempre desta série.
 

 
Completa a viagem do Dragão de Dojima.

好評を博した『龍が如く５　夢、叶えし者』が1080p&60fps化し甦る！
 

 
五人の主人公、全国五つの歓楽街を舞台に繰り広げられるストーリーは、
 
ボリューム、登場キャラクターなど、何もかもが『龍が如く』シリーズ最大級！
 
プレイスポット、タイアップ企業も過去作品を大きく凌駕！
 

 
『龍が如く５　夢、叶えし者』はゲームとしての新たな領域へと踏み込んでいます。
 

 
【出演】
 
黒田崇矢、山寺宏一、釘宮理恵、小山力也、森川智之
 
哀川翔、大東駿介、片瀬那奈/徳重聡/吹越満、奥田瑛二
 
【総合監督】
 
名越稔洋

In December 2012, Kazuma Kiryu left his past as a ""legendary yakuza"" and his place of peace in Okinawa.

Experience the fifth chapter of the Kazuma Kiryu saga in 1080p and 60fps. Get ready for a Yakuza experience of unprecedented scale. Follow five characters across five Japanese cities, each trying to achieve their dream. The connections between them bring them together, but the conflict that unfolds is nothing any of them could have predicted.

Nu kan du opleve det femte kapitel i Kazuma-sagaen i 1080p ved 60 fps.
 

 
I december 2012 forlod Kazuma Kiryu sin fortid som ""legendarisk yakuza"" og sin fredelige oase på Okinawa.
 

 
Han får nu dagene til at gå med at køre taxi i et hjørne af Fukuokas luderkvarter, hvor han skjuler sin sande identitet. Alt det for at opfylde en vigtig persons ""drøm"".
 

 
En foruroligende atmosfære begynder dog at vokse i det normalt stabile Kanto-kvarter og hos Kansai-yakuzaen, og der viser sig at være et komplot om at trække alle yakuza-organisationerne i Japan ind i en krig.
 

 
Kiryu må endnu engang ty til vold for at beskytte sin elskedes ""drømme"".
 

 
Dette er historien om fire mænd og en kvinde, der jagter deres drømme i fem storbyer i Japan og på seriens største skala hidtil.
 

 
Gennemfør Dragen fra Dojimas rejse.

Gioca il quinto capitolo della saga di Kazuma Kiryu, in 1080p e 60 fps.
 

 
Nel dicembre 2012, Kazuma Kiryu abbandonò il suo passato di ""yakuza leggendario"" e il suo rifugio di pace a Okinawa.
 

 
Ora lavora come tassista in un angolo del quartiere a luci rosse di Fukuoka, nascondendo la sua vera identità. Tutto per realizzare il ""sogno"" di una persona importante.
 

 
Ma un'atmosfera inquietante inizia a farsi strada nell'apparentemente equilibrata società della yakuza del Kanto e del Kansai, fino a rivelare un piano per scatenare una guerra totale tra tutte le organizzazioni yakuza del Giappone.
 

 
Per proteggere il ""sogno"" della sua amata, Kiryu viene trascinato nuovamente nel vortice della battaglia.
 

 
Questa è la storia di quattro uomini e una ragazza che inseguono i loro ""sogni"" in cinque grandi città del Giappone, nell'episodio più vasto della serie.
 

 
Completa il viaggio del Drago di Dojima.
computerspil fra 2021
videogioco del 2021

brief:
Experience the fifth chapter of the Kazuma Kiryu saga in 1080p and 60fps.
 

 
In December 2012, Kazuma Kiryu left his past as a ""legendary yakuza"" and his place of peace in Okinawa.
 

 
He now spends his days as a cab driver in a corner of Fukuoka's red-light district, hiding his true identity. All for the sake of fulfilling the ""dream"" of an important person.
 

 
However, a disturbing atmosphere begins to drift through the supposedly well-balanced society of the Kanto and Kansai yakuza, emerging as a plot to drag all of the yakuza organizations in Japan to war.
 

 
In order to protect the ""dreams"" of his loved one, Kiryu is drawn into the vortex of battle once again.
 

 
This is the story of four men and a girl chasing their ""dreams"" in five major cities in Japan, presented on the largest scale of the series yet.
 

 
Complete The Dragon of Dojima’s journey.

title: Valkyria Chronicles™
description:
The critically acclaimed RPG Valkyria Chronicles invades PC in 1080p True HD! 
  All previously released DLC included 
 
 Set in a fictitious continent reminiscent of the 1930s, Valkyria Chronicles depicts Europa, divided and ruled by two super powers: the Empire and the Federation. The Empire has set its sights on invading the principality Gallia, which shares its borders with the two superpowers, in an attempt to secure an invaluable natural resource, Ragnite. Within this struggle a hero named Welkin, and his fellow soldiers of the Gallian Militia, ‘Squad 7’ are fighting back against the invasion and the Empire’s attempts to unify the continent under its power. 
 
 During the ensuing war, Squad 7 discovers that the Empire possesses a secret weapon, known as the “Valkyrur” – an ancient race with special powers thought to exist only in legends. With this new discovery, the fate of Gallia’s ability to defeat the Empire and save the lives of the Gallian citizens… 
 
   “CANVAS” graphics engine: A unique engine that produces breath taking images that look like watercolour paintings in motion.
   “BLiTZ” tactical battle system: Experience strategic maneuvering of units combined with conventional RPG gameplay, all layered on top of the moment to moment action afforded by real-time controls as players command each squad member and tank in battle.
   Epic storyline: Players will immerse themselves in the epic struggle for freedom, as the fate of the world lies in the hands of Welkin and the members of the 7th platoon.
   Customisation: Over 100 customisable characters allow players to create a variety of platoons to suit each battle’s needs.
   Beautifully rendered battlefields: Players explore 30 different environments, using unique terrain features to gain advantages in battle.  
 Additionally this brand new PC digital version comes bundled with all previously released DLC, including: 
 
   Hard EX Mode (harder versions of skirmish missions in the main game)
   Edy’s Mission “Enter the Edy Detachment” (a side story campaign)
   Selvaria’s Mission “Behind Her Blue Flame” (a side story campaign)
   Challenge of the Edy Detachment (six challenge missions)

title: What Remains of Edith Finch
description:
What Remains of Edith Finch is a collection of short stories about a cursed family in Washington State.

Each story offers a chance to experience the life of a different family member with stories ranging from the early 1900s to the present day. The gameplay and tone of the stories are as varied as the family members themselves. The only constants are that each is played from a first-person perspective and that each story ends with that family member's death. It's a game about what it feels like to be humbled and astonished by the vast and unknowable world around us.

You'll follow Edith Finch as she explores the history of her family and tries to figure out why she's the last Finch left alive.

title: Dance Dance Revolution
description:
Dance Dance Revolution (ダンスダンスレボリューション Dansu Dansu Reboryūshon?), abbreviated DDR and also known as Dancing Stage in earlier games in Europe and Australasia, and some other games in Japan, is a music video game series produced by Konami. Introduced in Japan in 1998 as part of the Bemani series, and released in North America and Europe in 1999, Dance Dance Revolution is the pioneering series of the rhythm and dance genre in video games. Players stand on a "dance platform" or stage and hit colored arrows laid out in a cross with their feet to musical and visual cues. Players are judged by how well they time their dance to the patterns presented to them and are allowed to choose more music to play to if they receive a passing score.

Dance Dance Revolution has been given much critical acclaim for its originality and stamina in the video game market. There have been dozens of arcade-based releases across several countries and hundreds of home video game console releases, promoting a music library of original songs produced by Konami's in-house artists and an eclectic set of licensed music from many different genres. The DDR series has inspired similar games such as Pump It Up by Andamiro and In the Groove by Roxor

title: Super Monkey Ball
description:
Super Monkey Ball is a 2001 platform party video game developed by Amusement Vision and published by Sega. The game debuted in Japan at the 2001 Amusement Operators Union trade show as Monkey Ball, an arcade cabinet running on Sega's NAOMI hardware and controlled with a distinctive banana-shaped analog stick. Due to the failure of Sega's Dreamcast home console and the company's subsequent restructuring, an enhanced port dubbed Super Monkey Ball was released as a launch title for the GameCube in late 2001, garnering interest as Sega's first game published for a Nintendo home console.

Conceived by Amusement Vision head Toshihiro Nagoshi, Super Monkey Ball involves guiding a transparent ball containing one of four monkeys—AiAi, MeeMee, Baby, and GonGon—across a series of maze-like platforms. The player must reach the goal without falling off or letting the timer reach zero to advance to the next stage. There are also several multiplayer modes: independent minigames as well as extensions of the main single-player game.

This game has a story that is only told in the Japanese version. Here is an excerpt, translated from Japanese:

AiAi, MeeMee, and Baby are a good family and live peacefully in Jungle Island. One day, out of the distant islands, GonGon, leader of the Gorillas, brought in a raid to the island. They intend to hog all the bananas for themselves! AiAi escaped from the spot, and got tired and fell asleep. In his dreams, AiAi was told in his dreams there is a paradise called "Banana Island" in the sky from the "Grand Monkey". But in order to go there, you have to go through a couple of traps and gimmicks. But the Grand Monkey taught AiAi a magical spell: "Ei Ei Poo!" That protects him from any danger. AiAi wakes up quickly, and as he says "Ei Ei Poo!", A big ball flies out of the sky He gets insides of it and flies high above the sky. Now, survive several traps and tricks, and aim for it! Banana Island!

When the player completes the Master Stages (in which the setting is above Banana Island), if they play as AiAi, MeeMee, or Baby, they will be able to go to Banana Island and enjoy all the bananas it has to offer. However, if you play as GonGon, he will be locked out of the place in which the bananas are kept while the other monkeys enjoy the bananas inside.

title: Left 4 Dead 2
description: Left 4 Dead 2 is a cooperative first-person shooter video game, the sequel to Valve Corporation's Left 4 Dead. The Game builds upon cooperatively focused gameplay and Valve's proprietary Source engine, the same game engine used in the original Left 4 Dead. Set during the aftermath of an apocalyptic pandemic, Left 4 Dead 2 focuses on four new Survivors, fighting against hordes of the Infected, who develop severe psychosis and exhibit zombie-like tendencies. The Survivors must fight their way through five campaigns, interspersed with safe houses that act as checkpoints, with the goal of escape at each campaign's finale.

localized_description.text: Left 4 Dead 2 is a cooperative first-person shooter video game, the sequel to Valve Corporation's Left 4 Dead. The Game builds upon cooperatively focused gameplay and Valve's proprietary Source engine, the same game engine used in the original Left 4 Dead. Set during the aftermath of an apocalyptic pandemic, Left 4 Dead 2 focuses on four new Survivors, fighting against hordes of the Infected, who develop severe psychosis and exhibit zombie-like tendencies. The Survivors must fight their way through five campaigns, interspersed with safe houses that act as checkpoints, with the goal of escape at each campaign's finale.

Ambientado en el apocalipsis zombi, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) es la esperadísima secuela del galardonado Left 4 Dead, el juego cooperativo número 1 de 2008. 

 Este FPS cooperativo de acción y terror os llevará a ti y a tus amigos por las ciudades, pantanos y cementerios del Sur Profundo, desde Savannah hasta Nueva Orleans, a lo largo de cinco extensas campañas.

 Jugarás como uno de los cuatro nuevos supervivientes, armado con un amplio y devastador arsenal de armas clásicas y mejoradas. Además de las armas de fuego, también tendrás la oportunidad de masacrar a los infectados con diversas armas de combate cuerpo a cuerpo, desde motosierras hasta hachas, e incluso una mortífera sartén.

 Pondrás a prueba estas armas contra tres espantosos y formidables nuevos infectados especiales (o jugarás como ellos en el modo Enfrentamiento). También te encontrarás con cinco nuevos infectados comunes no comunes, incluyendo a los aterradores embarrados.

 AI Director 2.0 lleva la jugabilidad frenética y repleta de acción de L4D a un nivel superior. Esta versión mejorada de Director tiene la capacidad de modificar por procedimientos la meteorología en la que luchas y las rutas que tomas, además de adaptar la población enemiga, los efectos y los sonidos para ajustarlos a tus acciones. L4D2 promete una experiencia satisfactoria, única y desafiante en cada partida, personalizada de acuerdo con tu estilo de juego.

   Acción cooperativa de nueva generación de la mano de los creadores de Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress y Counter-Strike.

   Más de 20 nuevas armas y objetos encabezados por más de 10 armas de combate cuerpo a cuerpo (hacha, motosierra, sartén, bate de béisbol...) te permitirán enfrentarte a los zombis desde bien cerca.

   Nuevos supervivientes. Nueva historia. Nuevos diálogos. 

   Cinco extensas campañas para los modos Cooperativo, Enfrentamiento y Supervivencia.

   Un modo multijugador completamente nuevo.

   Infectados comunes no comunes. Cada una de las cinco nuevas campañas contiene al menos un nuevo tipo de zombi común no común exclusivo de esa campaña. 

   AI Director 2.0: La avanzada tecnología bautizada como AI Director caracterizó la jugabilidad única de L4D permitiendo ajustar dinámicamente la población enemiga, los efectos y la música a las acciones de los jugadores. L4D2 incorpora el nuevo AI Director 2.0, que amplía la capacidad del Director para personalizar el diseño de los niveles, los objetos del entorno, la meteorología y la iluminación para reflejar los diferentes momentos del día.

   Un sistema de estadísticas, clasificaciones y premios que fomenta el juego cooperativo.

Situé dans un univers post-apocalyptique peuplé de zombies, Left 4 Dead 2 est la suite très attendue du meilleur jeu de coop de 2008. 

 Ce jeu de tir d'action et de coop à la première personne entraîne votre équipe dans les cimetières et marécages, de Savannah à La Nouvelle-Orléans en 5 campagnes.

 Vous incarnerez l'un des quatre survivants et vous disposerez d'un vaste arsenal d'armes de destruction classiques et améliorables. En plus des armes à feu, vous aurez également accès à des armes tranchantes et contondantes pour produire un maximum de dégâts en corps à corps : tronçonneuses, haches et la mortelle poêle à frire.

 Ces armes seront à mettre à l'épreuve (ou à utiliser en mode Versus) contre d'horribles adversaires comme les trois nouveaux infectés spéciaux. Vous rencontrerez également cinq nouveaux zombies communs singuliers, notamment les terribles Mudmen (Boueux).

 La jouabilité nerveuse orientée action du jeu est portée à un niveau supérieur par une nouvelle intelligence artificielle : AI Director 2.0. Cette nouvelle version de Director modifie procéduralement la météo de vos combats et les chemins que vous empruntez, et adapte le nombre de vos adversaires, les sons et les effets selon vos performances. L4D2 vous apportera une expérience unique et adaptée à votre style de jeu à chaque session.

   Jeu d'action et de coopération nouvelle génération par les créateurs de Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress et Counter-Strike.

   Avec plus de vingt armes et objets, dont au moins dix armes de corps à corps (hache, tronçonneuse, poêle à frire, batte de base-ball...), vous tiendrez les zombies en respect.

   Nouveaux survivants, nouvelle histoire, nouveaux dialogues. 

   Cinq nouvelles campagnes pour les modes coopératifs, survie et en opposition (Versus).

   Un tout nouveau mode multijoueur.

   Zombies communs singuliers. Chacune des cinq campagnes contient au moins un type de zombie commun singulier exclusif. 

   AI Director 2.0 : la technologie avancée d'AI Director avait façonné la jouabilité unique de L4D en personnalisant l'introduction des adversaires, les effets et la musique en fonction des performances du joueur ou de la joueuse. L4D2 utilise AI Director 2.0, qui étend les possibilités de personnalisation à la composition de l'environnement des cartes, aux objets du monde virtuel, à la météo, aux effets spéciaux et aux variations des éclairages en fonction de l'heure de la journée.

   Statistiques, classements et système de récompense pour le jeu coopératif.

Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2), das Zombieapokalypsenabenteuer schlechthin, ist die mit Spannung erwartete Fortsetzung des preisgekrönten Spiels Left 4 Dead, der Nr. 1 unter den Koop-Spielen von 2008. 

 In diesem kooperativen Action-Horror-FPS durchstreifen Sie mit Ihren Freunden Städte, Sümpfe und Friedhöfe der amerikanischen Südstaaten in fünf groß angelegten Kampagnen von Savannah bis New Orleans.

 Spielen Sie als einer der vier neuen Überlebenden, ausgerüstet mit einer großen und verheerenden Anzahl bekannter und verbesserter Waffen. Nicht, dass Sie im Kampf gegen die Infizierten auf Feuerwaffen beschränkt wären – Sie können sich darüber hinaus auch mit Kettensägen, Äxten und tödlichen Bratpfannen austoben!

 Testen Sie die durchschlagende Wirkung dieser Waffen an drei grauenerregenden und respekteinflößenden, speziellen Infizierten (oder spielen Sie im Versus-Modus). Außerdem gibt es unter den fünf neuen und ungewöhnlich gewöhnlichen Infizierten jetzt die Mudmen.

 AI Director 2.0. bringt das schnelllebige, actionreiche Gameplay von L4D auf das nächste Level. Dieser verbesserte Director verändert das Wetter und die Wege, die Sie einschlagen, prozedural und passt Gegner, Effekte und Geräusche an Ihre Leistung an. Jede Partie von L4D2 ist eine rundum befriedigende und einzigartig herausfordernde Erfahrung, die auf Ihren Spielstil zugeschnitten ist.

   Koop-Action der nächsten Generation von den Entwicklern von Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress und Counter-Strike.

   Über 20 neue Waffen und Gegenstände, gekrönt von mehr als 10 Nahkampfwaffen – rücken Sie den Zombies mit Äxten, Kettensägen, Bratpfannen und Baseballschlägern aus nächster Nähe zu Leibe!

   Neue Überlebende. Neue Geschichte. Neue Dialoge. 

   Fünf groß angelegte Kampagnen für Koop-, Versus- und Survival-Modus.

   Ein brandneuer Mehrspielermodus.

   Ungewöhnlich gewöhnliche Infizierte. Jede der neuen fünf Kampagnen beinhaltet mindestens einen neuen ungewöhnlich gewöhnlichen Zombie, exklusiv zu dieser Kampagne gehörend. 

   AI Director 2.0: Die hochentwickelte Technologie namens „The AI Director“ macht das einzigartige Gameplay von L4D möglich, indem sie Gegner, Effekte und musikalische Untermalung basierend auf der Leistung der Spieler verändert. Der AI Director 2.0 in L4D2 verfügt über erweiterte Möglichkeiten, das Layout von Levels sowie Objekte, Wetter und Beleuchtung in der Spielwelt an unterschiedliche Tageszeiten anzupassen.

   Statistiken, Ranglisten und ein Belohnungssystem fördern kooperatives Spielen.

Passado num apocalipse de zombies, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) é a sequela ansiosamente aguardada do galardoado Left 4 Dead, o jogo cooperativo n.º 1 de 2008. 

 Este jogo cooperativo de tiros na primeira pessoa de ação e terror vai levar-te a ti e aos teus amigos por cidades, pântanos e cemitérios do interior sul dos Estados Unidos, de Savannah a Nova Orleães, ao longo de cinco extensas campanhas.

 Vais jogar como um de quatro novos sobreviventes, armados com uma variedade devastadora de armas clássicas e melhoradas. Além de armas de fogo, também terás a oportunidade de descarregar alguma agressividade nos infectados com uma variedade de armas corpo a corpo, como motosserras, machados e até a mortífera frigideira.

 Poderás ver em primeira mão a letalidade destas armas contra três novos infectados especiais horripilantes e formidáveis (ou se jogares como um deles no modo Versus). Também irás encontrar cinco novos infectados comuns incomuns, como os aterradores "homens de lama".

 Para ajudarmos a levar a jogabilidade frenética e repleta de ação do L4D para o próximo nível, desenvolvemos o Realizador de I.A. 2.0 (AI Director 2.0). Este Realizador melhorado tem a capacidade de alterar de forma procedimental o clima e os caminhos do teu trajeto, para além de personalizar a população de inimigos, os efeitos e os sons para corresponderem ao teu desempenho. O L4D2 garante uma experiência satisfatória e distintamente desafiadora em cada partida, adaptando-se ao teu estilo de jogo.

   Jogo de ação cooperativa da próxima geração, dos criadores de Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress e Counter-Strike.

   Mais de 20 novas armas e itens, incluindo mais de 10 armas corpo a corpo (como machados, motosserras, frigideiras, bastões de basebol) que te permitem lidar de perto com os zombies.

   Novos sobreviventes. Nova história. Novos diálogos. 

   Mais de cinco extensas campanhas para os modos Campanha, Versus e Sobrevivência.

   Um modo multijogador inédito.

   Infectados comuns incomuns. Cada uma das cinco novas campanhas conta com pelo menos um novo zombie comum incomum exclusivo. 

   Realizador de I.A. 2.0: uma tecnologia avançada conhecida como Realizador de I.A. (AI Director) foi responsável pela jogabilidade única do L4D, personalizando a população de inimigos, efeitos e música com base no desempenho dos jogadores. O L4D2 traz consigo o melhorado Realizador de I.A. 2.0, que expande a capacidade do Realizador de personalizar a disposição dos níveis, os mundo, o clima e até a iluminação do mundo, de modo a corresponder a diferentes alturas do dia.

   Um sistema de estatísticas, classificações e reconhecimentos estimula a cooperação.

Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) foregår i en zombie-apokalyptisk verden og er den længe ventede efterfølger til det prisvindende co-op-spil Left 4 Dead fra 2008. 

 Dette actionprægede FPS-gyserspil tager dig og dine venner gennem byer, sumper og kirkegårde i USA's sydstater i fem store kampagner.

 Du spiller som en af fire overlevende, der er bevæbnet med et bredt og altødelæggende arsenal af klassiske og opgraderede våben. Ud over at gå amok med skydevåben kan du også bruge alle mulige nærkampsvåben lige fra motorsave til økser til at give dine aggressioner frit løb og nedslagte inficerede zombier – der er endda en dødbringende stegepande.

 Våbnene bliver sat på prøve mod tre nye rædselsfulde og frygtindgydende specielle inficerede – eller du kan spille som en af dem i "Hold mod hold". Der er også fem nye ualmindelig almindelige inficerede, inklusive de rædselsfulde muddermænd.

 AI-manager 2.0 hjælper med til at tage L4D's vilde, actionpakkede gameplay til nye højder. Denne forbedrede manager kan ændre vejret, du kæmper i, eller de veje, du tager, og kan derudover tilpasse mængden af fjender, effekter og lyde, så det alt sammen passer til din præstation. L4D2 byder på en tilfredsstillende, unik og udfordrende oplevelse, som passer til din spillestil, hver gang du spiller.

   Næste generations co-op-actionspil fra skaberne af Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress og Counter-Strike.

   Over 20 nye våben og genstande med over 10 nærkampsvåben – økse, motorsav, stegepande, baseballkølle – der gør det muligt at komme helt tæt på zombierne.

   Nye overlevende. Ny historie. Ny dialog. 

   Fem omfattende kampagner til co-op og spiltilstandene "Hold mod hold" og "Overlevelse for hold".

   En helt ny multiplayertilstand.

   Ualmindelig almindelige inficerede. Hver af de fem nye kampagner har mindst én ualmindelig almindelig zombie, som er eksklusiv til den pågældende kampagne. 

   AI-manager 2.0: En avanceret teknologi kaldet AI-manager drev L4D's unikke gameplay ved at tilpasse mængden af fjender, effekter og musik baseret på spillerens præstation. L4D 2 kommer med AI-manager 2.0, som udvider managerens evne til at tilpasse banens layout, objekter i verden, vejret og belysningen for at afspejle forskellige tidspunkter på dagen.

   Samarbejde i spillet drives af statistikker, ranglister og et præmiesystem.

Ambientato durante l'apocalisse dei morti viventi, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) è l'attesissimo sequel di Left 4 Dead, il gioco co-op numero 1 del 2008.

 Questo sparatutto in prima persona d'azione horror è un gioco co-op che porterà te e i tuoi amici tra le città, paludi e cimiteri del profondo sud degli Stati Uniti, da Savannah a New Orleans, attraverso cinque ampie campagne.

 Vestirai i panni di uno di quattro nuovi Sopravvissuti, armato di un vasto e devastante arsenale di armi classiche e migliorate. Oltre che con le armi da fuoco, avrai la possibilità di farla pagare agli Infetti con una varietà di sanguinose armi da mischia, dalle motoseghe alle asce, passando per la letale padella.

 Metterai alla prova queste armi contro tre potenti, orripilanti nuovi Infetti speciali (oppure ne dovrai evitare i colpi nella modalità Avversari). Te la vedrai anche con cinque nuovi Infetti comuni non comuni, tra cui gli spaventosi uomini di fango.

 Ad aiutare il gameplay frenetico e ricco d'azione di L4D a fare un ulteriore salto di qualità ci pensa l'IA Director 2.0. Questa versione migliorata del Director è in grado di modificare in maniera procedurale il meteo durante le tue battaglie e i percorsi che seguirai, oltre a regolare il numero e tipo di nemici, gli effetti e i suoni in base alle tue prestazioni. L4D2 promette un'esperienza soddisfacente e con sfide uniche ogni volta che si gioca, su misura per il tuo stile di gioco.

   Azione co-op di nuova generazione dai creatori di Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress e Counter-Strike.

   Oltre 20 nuovi oggetti e armi, in particolare oltre 10 armi da mischia (tra cui ascia, motosega, padella, mazza da baseball), per permetterti di scontrarti corpo a corpo con gli zombi.

   Nuovi Sopravvissuti. Nuova trama. Nuovi dialoghi. 

   Cinque ampie campagne in modalità co-op, Avversari e Sopravvivenza.

   Una nuovissima modalità multigiocatore.

   Infetti comuni non comuni. Ognuna delle cinque nuove campagne presenta almeno un nuovo zombi comune non comune esclusivo per ciascuna campagna. 

   IA Director 2.0. Una nuova tecnologia avanzata, chiamata IA Director, dirigeva il gameplay unico di L4D, personalizzando i nemici presenti, gli effetti e la musica in base alle prestazioni dei giocatori. L4D2 è controllato dall'IA Director 2.0, che è in grado di personalizzare ancora di più la struttura dei livelli, gli oggetti di gioco, il meteo e la luminosità per riflettere i diversi momenti della giornata.

   Statistiche, classifiche e un sistema di ricompense incoraggiano uno stile gioco collaborativo.

brief: Left 4 Dead 2 is a cooperative first-person shooter video game, the sequel to Valve Corporation's Left 4 Dead. The Game builds upon cooperatively focused gameplay and Valve's proprietary Source engine, the same game engine used in the original Left 4 Dead. Set during the aftermath of an apocalyptic pandemic, Left 4 Dead 2 focuses on four new Survivors, fighting against hordes of the Infected, who develop severe psychosis and exhibit zombie-like tendencies. The Survivors must fight their way through five campaigns, interspersed with safe houses that act as checkpoints, with the goal of escape at each campaign's finale.

title: Halo: Reach
description: Experience the story before the events of Halo: Combat Evolved as you fight to defend the planet Reach from a harrowing Covenant invasion. In this first-person shooter you can customize your own Spartan with armor and accessories to experience both a pulse-pounding campaign and addictive multiplayer mode. Reach will fall, but it won't go down without a fight.

title: The Void
description:
A first-person game in which after starving to death, the player wakes up in the Void, a dying land housing numerous Sisters and long-absent Brothers, all of whom subsist on Color, the essence of life in the Void. With the player's arrival, a resurgence of Color is observed in the Void, prompting the Brothers to return and subject the player to various trials so that he may also become a Brother by using and sharing Color.

When a person’s soul is extinguished, for a brief flickering moment it passes The Void—a grey limbo, breathed back to life by scarce droplets of Color scattered across it. Ravenous, monstrous Brothers beckon the soul to preserve every bit of it; enticing, sly Sisters beg to be fed. The whole Void, inhabited also by a multitude of weird and sometimes scary creatures, changes with every droplet of Color used, making every action you take have repercussions across the whole world.

But perhaps there is another way to use the Color. The way to break out of the never-ending cycle of the Void. Nourishing Color in gardens and fighting the Void’s creatures, unlocking the Sisters’ hearts and taking on their Brothers, the player gets the chance to find it… and achieve ultimate transcendence.

title: LocoRoco
description: The peaceful world of the LocoRoco are under attack by the not-so-nice Moja Corps! These evil outer space creatures have come to take the LocoRoco from their land of blowing flowers, lively creatures and pastel scenery. As the planet where the LocoRoco inhabit, you must move them through more than 40 levels of slippery slopes, teetering platforms and maze-like passages. The LocoRoco have the uncanny ability to fluidly morph to their landscape, so all you need is to tilt, roll and bounce the happy blob-like creatures to safety!

title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
description:
The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild is the first 3D open-world game in the Zelda series. Link can travel anywhere and be equipped with weapons and armor found throughout the world to grant him various bonuses. Unlike many games in the series, Breath of the Wild does not impose a specific order in which quests or dungeons must be completed. While the game still has environmental obstacles such as weather effects, inhospitable lands, or powerful enemies, many of them can be overcome using the right method. A lot of critics ranked Breath of the Wild as one of the best video games of all time.

Link is awakened in a room by a voice calling him and learns that he has been asleep for 100 years after failing to stop a monster called Calamity Ganon. Although the monster is being held in Hyrule Castle by Princess Zelda, Calamity Ganon's power continues to grow and if not stopped he will eventually break free with enough power to destroy the entire world. Link embarks on his quest to defeat Calamity Ganon and save Hyrule and Zelda.

Link embarks on his quest to defeat Calamity Ganon and save Hyrule and Zelda.

Esqueça tudo que você sabe sobre os jogos da série The Legend of Zelda. Entre em um mundo de descobertas, exploração e aventura em The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild, o novo jogo da famosa série que veio para romper barreiras. Viaje pelos vastos campos, florestas e montanhas enquanto descobre o que aconteceu com o reino de Hyrule nesta deslumbrante aventura a céu aberto.

以广阔的世界为舞台，无论去哪里、做什么，冒险的一切由你决定。狩猎野生动物过活？去消灭魔物？逛尽各处景点？奔跑、游泳、滑翔、攀登，能在广阔无垠的世界中享受自由自在的冒险。使用 Nintendo Switch 的话，可以在家里的电视上仔细游玩后继续外出游玩，就连游戏方式都自由自在。

【故事大纲】
被称为大灾厄的灾害发生了，海拉鲁王国被灭亡了……
100年后，主角林克从地下遗迹的长眠中苏醒，在不可思议的声音引导下踏上大地。

《塞尔达传说 荒野之息》（日语：ゼルダの伝説 ブレス オブ ザ ワイルド，英语：The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild，港台译作“萨尔达传说 荒野之息”）是一款动作冒险游戏。本作由任天堂企划制作本部与任天堂旗下子公司Monolith Soft协力开发。游戏最早计划为Wii U平台独占发行，之后宣布将在任天堂新的混合型游戏主机任天堂Switch上发售，并将成为该主机的首发游戏之一。同时任天堂确认本作会是任天堂在Wii U上开发的最后一款游戏。
游戏最初于2013年公布，并计划于2015年发行。之后任天堂宣布游戏延期并最终定于2017年3月3日发行。
剧情
很久很久以前，海拉尔王国的各个族群和平共存。其中名为锡克族（Sheikah）的族人们制造了许多先进的科技来帮助海拉尔的人们。但是有一天，邪恶的梦魇加侬（Calamity Ganon）击败了勇者并试图占领海拉尔王国。情势紧迫下锡克族人启动了他们暗中制造、用来保护家园的机械巨兽和守卫者。这些机械士兵成功的将梦魇加侬封印在海拉尔城堡中，但是机械士兵们却遭到邪恶力量的控制而反过来攻击海拉尔人。因为惧怕著锡克族的力量，海拉尔王将他们统统放逐出海拉尔王国。
一百年后的现代，勇者林克从沉睡中苏醒，却失去了所有的记忆。林克在一个未知的女性声音的带领下遇见了一位长者，长者告诉他梦魇加侬依旧被封印在城堡内并日渐壮大自己的力量，林克必须在封印被破坏前拯救海拉尔王国。


《塞尔达传说 荒野之息》获得业界极高的好评。国外多家游戏媒体给予满分评价。

title: Nine Sols
description:
Nine Sols is a lore rich, hand-drawn 2D action-platformer featuring Sekiro-inspired deflection focused combat, immersive storytelling, and unique Taopunk setting. Embark on a journey of Asian fantasy, explore the land once home to an ancient alien race, and follow a vengeful hero’s quest to slay the 9 Sols, formidable rulers of this forsaken realm.

In New Kunlun, hero Yi has awakened the 9 rulers of this forsaken realm. To defeat the 9 Sols in the deserted city.

“Becomes one with the way of Tao…”

New Kunlun, the Solarian’s last sanctuary, has remained quiet for centuries. Inside this vast realm, the ancient gods left mortals with a promised land that is forever protected by the sacred rituals, yet the truth of this world remains unknown to most. Everything changes when Yi, a long forgotten hero from the past, is awoken by a human child.

Follow Yi on his vengeful quest against the 9 Sols, formidable rulers of this forsaken realm, and obliterate any obstacles blocking your way in Sekiro-lite style combat. Explore in unique “Taopunk” setting that blends cyberpunk elements with Taoism and far eastern mythology. Unravel the mysteries of an ancient alien race and learn about the fate of mankind.

title: Borderlands 3
description: The original shooter-looter returns, packing bazillions of guns and a mayhem-fueled adventure! Blast through new worlds and enemies as one of four new Vault Hunters. Play solo or with friends to take on insane enemies, score loads of loot and save your home from the most ruthless cult leaders in the galaxy.

  关于游戏    
 射击夺宝游戏的鼻祖载誉归来，为您带来无穷无尽 的枪械和一场躁动无限的冒险旅途！选择四名全新寻宝猎人的其中一位，披挂上阵，在全新的世界中和新型敌人展开殊死之战。您可以单人游玩或是和好友一同与疯狂的敌人作战夺取成堆的战利品，并从星系最为残忍的邪教领袖手中拯救家园。 一场躁动无限的冒险旅途 阻止疯狂的Calypso Twins联合众强盗部族并夺取星系的终极力量。       寻宝猎人任你挑，玩法任你定 扮演四位全新的寻宝猎人的其中一位，每人都有丰富的技能树、能力和自定义选项。 锁定、装弹和寻宝 游戏中巨量的枪支和装备让你每次战斗都有机会获得新兵器。       全新的《无主之地》 探索潘多拉（Pandora）之上的全新世界，每个世界都有不同的环境和敌人。       快速行动，无间合作 无论你是什么等级，任务进度如何，都可以随时随机选择伙伴在线合作。

邊緣禁地合輯：潘朵拉寶盒  此作品收錄於《邊緣禁地合輯：潘朵拉寶盒》！
       
 
  邊緣禁地3：終極版  《邊緣禁地3：終極版》帶來了精粹的《邊緣禁地3》體驗，收錄了主遊戲和全部6款追加內容，並且一網打盡所有額外外觀包！

   DLC 1：莫西的帥氣頭彩大劫案現已推出。
    
   巴特史達林（Butt Stallion）武器外觀、武器飾品以及榴彈模組   豪華版額外內容：   復古裝飾包

   Gearbox 裝飾包
   玩具箱武器包
   可裝備的經驗以及戰利品掉落強化模組  
 
  關於此遊戲    
 正宗刷裝射擊遊戲歸位了，帶著多到爆炸的 槍跟超混亂的冒險回來了！扮演四位全新的尋寶獵人之一，在新世界中橫行霸道並擊敗敵人吧！您可以單人遊玩或是和好友一同與瘋狂的敵人作戰奪取成堆的戰利品，並從星系最為殘忍的邪教領袖手中拯救家園。 混亂至極的刺激旅程 阻止瘋狂的克利索雙胞胎（Calypso Twins）將暴徒集團聯合起來、奪取星系的至高權力。       屬於您的尋寶獵人、屬於您的遊戲風格 扮演四位全新的尋寶獵人之一，這些尋寶者都擁有頗具深度的技能樹、能力以及自訂選項。 鎖定、填彈、奪取戰利品！ 數以億計的槍枝與裝置種類，每一場戰鬥都有機會取得全新裝備。       嶄新的邊緣禁地 探索潘朵拉之外的新世界，每一寸新土地上都將有獨特的環境與敵人。       快速、無接縫的合作遊戲 不論您的等級或是任務進度，您都能使用線上合作來隨時跟任何人一起進行遊戲。

Borderlands Collection: Pandora's Box  This title is included in Borderlands Collection: Pandora's Box!
       
 
  Borderlands 3 Ultimate Edition  Borderlands 3 Ultimate Edition is the quintessential Borderlands 3 experience, featuring the base game plus all 6 content add-ons and the full collection of bonus cosmetic packs!
    
 
  Borderlands 3 Super Deluxe Edition  Continue your Borderlands 3 adventure with the Season Pass!
 
 This content is included with purchase of the Borderlands 3 Super Deluxe Edition, Borderlands 3 Ultimate Edition, and Borderlands 3 Collector's Edition.
 
     The Season Pass includes:   Moxxi’s Heist of the Handsome Jackpot campaign add-on.
   Guns, Love, and Tentacles campaign add-on.
   Bounty of Blood campaign add-on.
   Psycho Krieg and the Fantastic Fustercluck campaign add-on.

  About the Game    
 The original shooter-looter returns, packing bazillions of guns and an all-new mayhem-fueled adventure! Blast through new worlds and enemies as one of four brand new Vault Hunters – the ultimate treasure-seeking badasses of the Borderlands, each with deep skill trees, abilities, and customization. Play solo or join with friends to take on insane enemies, score loads of loot and save your home from the most ruthless cult leaders in the galaxy. A MAYHEM-FUELED THRILL RIDE  Stop the fanatical Calypso Twins from uniting the bandit clans and claiming the galaxy’s ultimate power. Only you, a thrill-seeking Vault Hunter, have the arsenal and allies to take them down.       YOUR VAULT HUNTER, YOUR PLAYSTYLE  Become one of four extraordinary Vault Hunters, each with unique abilities, playstyles, deep skill trees, and tons of personalization options. All Vault Hunters are capable of awesome mayhem alone, but together they are unstoppable. LOCK, LOAD, AND LOOT With bazillions of guns and gadgets, every fight is an opportunity to score new gear. Firearms with self-propelling bullet shields? Check. Rifles that spawn fire-spewing volcanoes? Obviously. Guns that grow legs and chase down enemies while hurling verbal insults? Yeah, got that too.       NEW BORDERLANDS  Discover new worlds beyond Pandora, each featuring unique environments to explore and enemies to destroy. Tear through hostile deserts, battle your way across war-torn cityscapes, navigate deadly bayous, and more!       QUICK & SEAMLESS CO-OP ACTION Play with anyone at any time with online co-op, regardless of your level or mission progress.

  Acerca del juego    
 ¡Vuelve el padre de los shooter-looter, con tropecientas mil armas y una aventura caótica! Arrasa a tus enemigos y descubre mundos inéditos con uno de los cuatro nuevos buscacámaras. Juega solo o con amigos para derribar a adversarios increíbles, hacerte con montones de botín y salvar tu hogar de la secta más cruel de la galaxia. UNA AVENTURA A TOPE DE CAOS Y ACCIÓN Evita que los fanáticos de los gemelos Calypso se unan a los clanes de bandidos y reclamen el poder supremo de la galaxia.       TU BUSCACÁMARAS Y TU ESTILO DE JUEGO Conviértete en uno de los cuatro nuevos buscacámaras, que podrás personalizar y desarrollar a través de sus distintos árboles de habilidades. ÁRMATE, CARGA Y SAQUEA Con tropecientas mil armas y dispositivos, cada pelea será tu oportunidad de conseguir más equipo nuevo.       BORDERLANDS NUEVO Descubre nuevos mundos más allá de Pandora, cada uno con entornos y enemigos únicos.       ACCIÓN COOPERATIVA RÁPIDA Y CONSTANTE Juega al cooperativo en línea con quien quieras y cuando quieras sin importar tu nivel o tu progreso en la misión.

  Infos zum Spiel    
 Der originale Shooter-Looter kehrt zurück mit Bazillionen an Waffen und einem Abenteuer voller Gemetzel! Ballere dich als einer von vier neuen Kammer-Jägern durch neue Welten und Feinde. Spiele solo oder mit Freunden, um dich irren Gegnern zu stellen, hole dir massenweise Beute und rette deine Heimat vor den skrupellosesten Kultanführern der Galaxis. EINE ACHTERBAHNFAHRT DURCH DAS CHAOS Stelle dich den fanatischen Calypso-Zwillingen entgegen, die die Banditen gegeneinander aufbringen wollen, um sich die ultimative Macht über die Galaxis zu sichern.       DEIN KAMMER-JÄGER, DEINE ART ZU SPIELEN Werde einer von 4 neuen Kammer-Jägern, jeder mit detailliertem Talentbaum, Fähigkeiten und Anpassungsmöglichkeiten. EIN SCHUSS, EIN TREFFER, MASSIG BEUTE Mit Bazillionen an Waffen und Apparaten gibt dir jeder Kampf die Möglichkeit, neue Ausrüstung zu ergattern.       NEUE GEBIETE IN DEN BORDERLANDS Entdecke neue Welten abseits von Pandora, jede davon mit einzigartigen Umgebungen und Gegnern.       SCHNELLE UND NAHTLOSE KOOP-ACTION Spiele jederzeit mit jedermann online, egal welches Level oder welcher Missionsfortschritt.

  Acerca do jogo    
 The original shooter-looter returns, packing bazillions of guns and an all-new mayhem-fueled adventure! Blast through new worlds and enemies as one of four brand new Vault Hunters – the ultimate treasure-seeking badasses of the Borderlands, each with deep skill trees, abilities, and customization. Play solo or join with friends to take on insane enemies, score loads of loot and save your home from the most ruthless cult leaders in the galaxy. A MAYHEM-FUELED THRILL RIDE  Stop the fanatical Calypso Twins from uniting the bandit clans and claiming the galaxy’s ultimate power. Only you, a thrill-seeking Vault Hunter, have the arsenal and allies to take them down.       YOUR VAULT HUNTER, YOUR PLAYSTYLE  Become one of four extraordinary Vault Hunters, each with unique abilities, playstyles, deep skill trees, and tons of personalization options. All Vault Hunters are capable of awesome mayhem alone, but together they are unstoppable. LOCK, LOAD, AND LOOT With bazillions of guns and gadgets, every fight is an opportunity to score new gear. Firearms with self-propelling bullet shields? Check. Rifles that spawn fire-spewing volcanoes? Obviously. Guns that grow legs and chase down enemies while hurling verbal insults? Yeah, got that too.       NEW BORDERLANDS  Discover new worlds beyond Pandora, each featuring unique environments to explore and enemies to destroy. Tear through hostile deserts, battle your way across war-torn cityscapes, navigate deadly bayous, and more!       QUICK & SEAMLESS CO-OP ACTION Play with anyone at any time with online co-op, regardless of your level or mission progress.

  ゲームについて    
 「シュータールーター」の元祖が戻ってきた。膨大な数の 武器と破天荒な戦いがてんこ盛りの冒険を楽しもう！新しい4人組ヴォルトハンターのひとりとして新たな世界に乗りこみ、敵をぶちのめせ！ソロまたは友達と協力してクレージーな敵に立ち向かい、大量の戦利品を集め、銀河一冷酷なカルト集団のリーダーから故郷を救おう。 破天荒でスリリングなアドベンチャー イカレたCalypso Twinsによる盗賊団の統一を阻止し、宇宙最強の力を手に入れよう。       ヴォルトハンターごとに変化するプレイスタイル 新しい4人組ヴォルトハンターの一員になろう。それぞれが独自のスキルツリーとアビリティを持ち、カスタマイズも自由自在。 銃をぶっ放し、アイテムを確保せよ 膨大な数の銃とガジェット。すべての戦いが新装備獲得のチャンスだ。       新たに広がる世界 パンドラを超える新しい世界に飛び込もう。すべての世界で環境と敵が異なっている。       クイック&シームレスな協力プレイ オンライン協力プレイで、レベルやミッションの進行状況に関わらず、いつでも、誰とでも遊ぶことができる。

射擊掠寶遊戲的鼻祖回來了，為您帶來數以億計的武器裝備和一段混亂至極的冒險旅途！扮演四位全新的尋寶獵人之一，在新世界中橫行霸道並擊敗敵人吧！您可以單人遊玩或是和好友一同與瘋狂的敵人作戰奪取成堆的戰利品，並從星系最為殘忍的邪教領袖手中拯救家園。

一段血脈僨張的混亂旅途
阻止瘋狂的Calypso Twins聯合強盜部族並奪取星系的終極力量。

屬於你的尋寶獵人和遊玩方式
成為4位全新尋寶獵人之一，每一位都擁有頗具深度的技能樹、能力以及自訂選項。

子彈上膛，盡情掠寶
數以億計的武器裝備和配件，讓您每一場戰鬥都有機會獲得全新裝備。

全新的邊緣禁地
探索Pandora以外的新世界，各自都擁有獨特的環境和敵人。

快速且無縫銜接的合作遊戲
可在任何時間和任何人共同遊玩，可選擇線上或分割畫面合作，不受等級或任務進度的影響。
